input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.4.2
            TITLE: the glv system must include a master switch, see ev.7.9.1

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.4.2: The GLV System must include a Master Switch, see EV.7.9.1
EV.4.4.2 The GLV System must include a Master Switch, see EV.7.9.1

final_answer: The GLV System must include a Master Switch, see EV.7.9.1
